hero.subtitle: Upload your face, paste your video URL, and get finished thumbnails — your face plus a bold hook, baked into one image. Free to start · No credit card.

form.errorInvalid: That doesn’t look like a valid YouTube URL. Try https://youtube.com/watch?v=...
form.errorOverLimit: You’ve used all {limit} free generations. Upgrade to Pro for more.
form.errorBusy: Too many requests at once. Please wait a moment and try again.
form.errorVideoNotFound: We couldn’t find that video — it may be private or deleted.
form.errorPersonaLoad: We couldn’t load your uploaded photo. Please re-upload and try again.
form.errorPersonaInvalid: There’s a problem with the uploaded photo. Please re-upload it.
form.errorServer: Something went wrong. Please try again.
form.urlHint: Works with youtube.com/watch, youtu.be, and Shorts links.

loading.stage3: Almost done — adding the finishing touches…
loading.estimate: This usually takes 40–60 seconds. Hang tight.

persona.label: Your face (optional)
persona.hint: Star in your own thumbnails — upload a clear photo of your face.
persona.consent: Without a photo, thumbnails are generated without a face.
persona.consentCheck: I confirm this is my own face, or a photo I have the right to use.
persona.consentRequired: Please tick the consent box before uploading your photo.
persona.tooLarge: That image is too large (max 4MB). Try a smaller photo.
persona.rateLimited: Too many uploads recently. Please wait a bit and try again.
persona.faceRejected: We couldn’t find a single clear face in that photo. Upload a clear, front-facing photo of just your face.

caption.label: Caption (optional)
caption.hint: · Auto-generated from the title if left blank

examples.heading: What you actually get
examples.subtitle: Real, unedited output — same face, four different concepts. In a real run, all 4 come from your single URL.
examples.note: The person in these samples is an AI-generated fictional persona. Your thumbnails use your own uploaded photo.

billing.errorAlreadySubscribed: You already have an active subscription. Use “Manage plan” to make changes.
billing.errorCheckout: Couldn’t start checkout. Please try again.
billing.errorPortal: Couldn’t open the billing portal. Please try again.

auth.signupSubtitle: Free thumbnails to start. No credit card.
auth.checkInbox: Check your inbox for a confirmation link.
